name: Dole Plantation
tagline: Touristy but fun — ride the Pineapple Express, get lost in the world's largest maze, and eat a Dole Whip at the source.
parking: Free parking lot, large and usually available
bestTime: Arrive by 10am to beat tour bus crowds. Weekdays are significantly less packed than weekends
kamaaina: Kamaaina discounts on train ride and maze with valid Hawaii ID
talkStory: Yes, it's a tourist trap — but it's a fun one, especially with kids. The Pineapple Express train ride (20 min, ~$14) gives a nice overview of the plantation and North Shore agriculture. The Pineapple Garden Maze is certified by Guinness as the world's largest — budget 30-45 min. The real move is to skip the gift shop markup and grab a Dole Whip (pineapple soft serve) from the stand out front. Great pit stop on the way to or from the North Shore. Locals rarely go, but visitors love it.
